ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist of the track */,
  "streams" INTEGER /* Number of times the track has been streamed */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to access the track on the streaming platform */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability score of the track */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy level of the track */,
  "key" INTEGER /* Musical key of the track */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the track */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Mode of the track (major or minor) */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness of the track */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness of the track */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness of the track */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness of the track */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence of the track */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the track */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the track */,
  "uri" TEXT /* URI of the track */,
  "analysis_url" TEXT /* URL to access the audio analysis of the track */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in milliseconds */,
  "time_signature" INTEGER /* Time signature of the track */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the track */,
  "mood" TEXT /* Mood of the track */,
  "is_explicit" INTEGER /* Whether the track is explicit */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the track */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the album of the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the artist */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the artist */,
  "artist_popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity of the artist */,
  "artist_followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers of the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist of the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "album_type" TEXT /* Type of the album (e.g., single, EP, album) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audio_features" (
  "audio_feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audio feature set */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* Reference to the track */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability score of the track */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy level of the track */,
  "key" INTEGER /* Musical key of the track */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the track */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Mode of the track (major or minor) */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness of the track */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness of the track */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness of the track */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness of the track */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence of the track */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audio_feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_features_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription the user has */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "user_age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "user_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "user_country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* Reference to the track */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., play, skip, like) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity occurred */,
  "activity_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the activity in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the playlist was created */,
  "playlist_description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_contents" (
  "playlist_content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track in a playlist */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the playlist */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* Reference to the track */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date when the track was added to the playlist */,
  "added_by" TEXT /* User who added the track to the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_contents_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_contents_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artist_followers" (
  "artist_follower_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist follower */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "follow_date" TEXT /* Date when the user followed the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_follower_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_followers_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_followers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* Reference to the track */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_comments_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* Reference to the track */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the track (1-5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_ratings_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
